body_txt: Someone threatens to kill someone else, often by yelling it at the top of their lungs or by simply saying it calmly . Or variations on this theme, most notably with the F-Bomb or with an accent such as "I keel yew!" . The threatened person may reply with " Is That a Threat? ". If there's no realistic chance of it being carried out, this is also quite a straightforward example of Ineffectual Death Threats — unless said target dies, in which case they'll be near the top of the suspect list. Note that this is a stock phrase and must be a variation on "I'll Kill You" and not just a threat on a person's life . Contrast You Will Be Spared , Never Say "Die" and I Kiss Your Foot .
